rows.claim: ~92% token reduction for same task (Jira MCP catalog vs reposix shell session)
rows.rationale: Measured reduction in docs/benchmarks/token-economy.md (baseline table, last run 2026-04-15): 89.1% (4883 MCP tokens → 531 reposix tokens). Claim overstates by ~2.9 percentage points. Test exists: quality/gates/perf/test_bench_token_economy.py::test_headline_reduction_matches_baseline_pair validates the benchmark runs and verifies the reduction ratio matches computed formula. PRIMARY BINDING BLOCKER: the claim uses '~92%' (approximate) but actual measured result is 89.1%, a 3.3% error margin. Requires decision: (A) update claim to '~89%', (B) rerun benchmark with updated fixture to match 92%, or (C) retire claim as marketing hypothesis pending real-backend data.
